blocks.content: Even without knowing Shirone's identity, those waiting for him included the kingdom's top officials and the Ten Mages of the Ivory Tower.
Either was not someone a magic school teacher could treat lightly, but Wizard insisted.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I want to go say hello! Quickly, quickly!
The teacher was pale.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Wizard, those people are very busy. Why not play with your teacher instead? Maybe, shall we draw?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: No! I'm going! I will go!
If it had been an ordinary child, perhaps the teacher wouldn't have insisted to such an extent.
However, Wizard had never shown social etiquette in front of anyone before.
Even when the king visited.
She pulled on His Majesty's beard.
Well, that's actually okay.
No one dotes on Wizard more than he does.
Being a mage herself, she knew the influence the Ivory Tower's star had on the kingdom.
Huh?
Suddenly, as the teacher's legs lifted off the ground, Wizard, holding her hand, led her forward.
Shirone's gaze changed.
Gravitational collapse.
It wasn't cast knowingly, but a phenomenon that naturally ignited within synesthetic thought.
Her potential is the strongest among humans...
Lampa's words suddenly made sense as Wizard slid on the ground and arrived.
Who are you, big brother?
With her abundant golden hair braided thickly on each side and faint freckles across her nose bridge, she was cute.
This is more serious than I thought.
He didn't want to use the term 'madness,' but her gaze was different from other children.
She already realizes her own strength.
She finds pleasure in the discomfort of others, even though she knows she is disliked.
A child who could beat adults.
When this simple curiosity merges with pleasure, it could amplify to near infinity...
Could this lead to becoming another Harvitz?
Though his thoughts were grave and extreme, Shirone greeted her with a smile.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hello? I'm an inspector for the kingdom.
What's an inspector?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Someone who checks if students are doing well, if they're having any hard times. You included.
Hmm.
As Wizard seemed to lose interest, Shirone asked a personal question out of curiosity.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How's school? Is magic fun?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Yes! It's fun!
Her emotional shift was as rapid as it was simple.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I can beat brothers, sisters, teachers, and all these men here!
As she pointed one by one at Lampa and then the Ten Mages of the Ivory Tower, the teacher's face turned red.
I'm sorry! She's still young...
Though it was a convenient excuse, Wizard didn't stop there and pointed at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: And I can beat you too.
The expressions of the Ten Mages of the Ivory Tower hardened as Shirone quizzically tilted his head.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You're a mage too, right? A kingdom inspector mage.
Lampa's eyes narrowed.
When the Great One conceals his energy, even my eyes can't gauge his level. Truly a terrifying talent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, I'm a mage too. Like Wizard, I studied magic diligently from a young age.
Wizard exaggeratedly pretended to laugh.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: But you're really weak.
Believing her instincts still showed her innocence despite her abilities...

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Wizard is strong. This much strong.
She gestured broadly with her short arms, indicating a wild nature.
It won't be easy to handle her,

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He didn't want to use the term 'madness,' but her gaze was different from other children.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She already realizes her own strength.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She finds pleasure in the discomfort of others, even though she knows she is disliked.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A child who could beat adults.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: When this simple curiosity merges with pleasure, it could amplify to near infinity...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could this lead to becoming another Harvitz?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Really? Hmm, what if Wizard loses? Do you think you'd get angry or sad?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I will win! I'll win everything!
A hidden anger exploded through the child's voice.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Go away! I hate you! Phoo, phoo!
She expressed the greatest hostility she could, suddenly grabbing dirt and throwing it at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Wizard!
While the teachers turned pale, Shirone did not flinch and continued.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Okay. Since Wizard can win everything, why don't you show me?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Yeah, good! Let's play! A game!
Used to tests from birth, Wizard turned towards the challenge.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, not a game. Real magic.
The teachers gasped, and the watching officials turned their heads.
But real combat...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay. She's fully capable. What do you think, Wizard? Can you still win?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Okay. I will win everything. Let's do that.
Shirone nodded, and Barlot, the leader of the Ten Mages of the Ivory Tower, stepped forward.
Then I will be your opponent.
The teachers couldn't believe their ears.
What?
Remembering what the star of the Ivory Tower entailed, they rushed over yelling.
This can't be! She's just a child! Let us do it instead!

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Inspector! I'll take responsibility for Wizard's rudeness. Please stop this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Barlot will test Wizard.
It seemed like a good match.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The teachers are scared. It means they don't know the true nature of what's beside them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I wish she wouldn't be treated as just a child.
That... That...
As the teachers looked on in disgust, Barlot grasped the true intention of the words.

blocks.speaker: Barlot
blocks.content: Is that the level?

blocks.speaker: Barlot
blocks.content: He had expected it, but hearing it from Shirone reignited his spirit.
Lampa intervened to mediate the atmosphere.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Then I will officiate. The match will last three minutes. However, I will intervene if it becomes dangerous.
With Lampa's words, the teachers finally snapped out of their panic state.
Three minutes, just last three minutes...

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Three minutes is enough to do anything at the level of the stars.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ultimately, even Lampa is siding with Shirone.
In the center of the training field, Barlot scrutinized Wizard with a cold gaze.
Synaesthetic thinking.
To humans, what is a creative notion is merely basic logic for Wizard.
If she can create all solutions...
Without a correct answer!
As Barlot's eyes widened, flames erupted from beneath the ground.
Crush with power!
A massive column of fire twisted in the air towards Wizard.
The training field blazed with giant flames, the teachers screamed in horror.
The dedicated teacher yelled at Lampa.
That's not what was promised! What law allows you to do this to a child? I'll sue you!
No one paid any attention.
Not Shirone, not Amy, not Lampa; they were only following the two shadows moving within the flames.
There was a solution after all.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: I found it. It happened beyond Barlot's limits of thought.
The decisive strike ended in futility, and the match was a close call.
Unbelievable.
While blocking magic from all directions could be intense...
Bang! Bang, bang!
Sometimes, seeing the face of an opponent made it hard to believe this was reality.
The students understood, but to the Ten Mages of the Ivory Tower, emotions could not become variables.

blocks.speaker: Barlot
blocks.content: Let me show you how an adult does it.
As he extended his hand beyond his robe, the gem embedded on the back of his glove radiated light.
Essence of the spirit.
The Ten Mages of the Ivory Tower possessed ten out of the seventeen that existed in the world.
Awakening of the Earth.
Krrrrrrr!
The ground trembled, and from all directions, the earth rose like waves, surging toward Wizard.
Lampa's expression hardened for the first time.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: This is dangerous!
The form that integrated all possibilities of the earth element resembled a disaster.
Huh? What?
The dome of earth that had trapped Wizard quickly shrank like a deflating balloon.
Oh no...
Just as Lampa was about to intervene, thousands of small droplets burst from the surface of the dome.
Huh?
And the next moment, with a tremendous roar, the earth exploded into pieces.
Yaaah!
Visible convection currents swirled around the now visible Wizard.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Technique isn't everything. Elements, willpower, even the laws of nature... ...can be created with creative thinking.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I will win!
Her desire manifested synesthetically, breaking norms with dozens of hybrid spells that rushed forth.
Damn! What is that?

blocks.speaker: Barlot
blocks.content: It's marvelous.

blocks.speaker: Barlot
blocks.content: The thrill of breaking the limits of thought was a thousand times more intense than the worry of death.
As the flash took him away, the hybrid spells exploded on the ground.
Koooooom!
Dust rose, and Barlot, grabbed by Lampa, landed next to the group.
Where's Wizard?
She emerged from the smoke, ran up to Barlot, and started shaking her hips.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Yay! I won, I won!
The teachers tried to intervene, but she was too angry this time to stop.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Idiot. Idiot. Phoo, phoo!

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Wizard, stop it. This is worse than usual.
Barlot stood up.

blocks.speaker: Barlot
blocks.content: No, I lost.
It was a fact known to everyone there, but hearing it from the party himself was shocking.

blocks.speaker: Barlot
blocks.content: I'm sorry, Mr. Lampa. It seems supervising Wizard is beyond my capabilities.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: No need for that. I'm surprised too. Anyway, the situation has become awkward.
Turning around, he saw the shoulder of an official facing the tree, shaking.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: This is huge.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Adrenaline was suffocating.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: A seven-year-old beat a star. Going to the Holy War for the Stang Kingdom isn't a dream. Ivory Tower or not, I must have her. Her parents are just dumb farmers, better I pay and adopt her...

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Peering into what was obviously in everyone's minds, Lampa sighed and turned back.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Should have brought her here three years ago.
At that time, the principled bureaucrats of the Ivory Tower's internal government prolonged the issue.
Of course, the final decision to make Shirone a star of the fourth order was once again right...

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: People need to be flexible. What's it to them if two are chosen? Obsessed with Karr...

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: It was unavoidable to feel regret.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It can't be helped.
Shirone comforted Lampa by patting his back and approached where Wizard was.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You really are good at magic, Wizard.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Yeah! Much better than you.
Wizard, still bearing some resentment, craned her neck, not even reaching Shirone's waist.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Wow, really? Then how about one last challenge with me?
The moment the stars of the Ivory Tower turned their heads, the dedicated teacher objected.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Enough already! Just because the child threw some dirt, does that warrant such relentless torment? Her abilities were proven in the last duel.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Of course. I'm sorry. But there are reasons. This isn't good for Wizard either.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: What do you mean...
Lampa cut him off.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: If Shirone decides to proceed, I can't stop him. However, I don't think I can be the judge.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: That's okay. I can control it.
The teacher frowned.
What are you talking about? Even the stars of the Ivory Tower couldn't win, how can you... Huh?
A face unknown, but a name known to anyone in the magic community.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: What! Shirone!
Amid the murmuring, Lampa spoke.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Sorry for not clarifying earlier, but can we trust Wizard with us one more time? There won't be any danger. We've already got the king's approval.
Receiving a glance from the official who squinted one eye and nodded,

blocks.speaker: Official
blocks.content: Really? Is this person really Shirone?
The Infinite Magician, one of the Five Stars of the Ivory Tower, the Yahweh of the Era, many titles flashed by.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Huh? Strong.
Turning at the voice, Wizard looked curiously at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Brother, you suddenly got stronger.
